caption: The video appears to be a news segment from News18 India, focusing on a political event or rally. The central figure is a man speaking into a microphone, gesturing with his hand as he addresses an audience. He is wearing a white shirt and a scarf draped over his shoulders. Behind him, another individual in a black jacket stands, possibly as security or part of the event staff. The background shows a crowd of people, some holding flags, indicating a public gathering. The text overlays in Hindi provide context, mentioning topics related to the Congress party, Tejaswi's picture, and the first meeting of the Bihar cabinet. The segment also includes images of other political figures, suggesting discussions about various political personalities and events. The time displayed on the screen is 10:07 PM, indicating that this is a late-night news broadcast.
